message:
fix(doctor): add REINDEX after bulk JSONL import to fix partial-index corruption (#246)

After a full JSONL rebuild, frankensqlite's B-tree layer can leave
partial indexes (like idx_issues_list_active_order) with missing rows.
VACUUM rewrites pages but does not rebuild index entries. Adding an
explicit REINDEX after VACUUM in rebuild_database_family fixes this at
the single chokepoint where all JSONL rebuilds flow through — covering
both `br doctor --repair` and auto-recovery paths.

Closes #246

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
